info.title: Finance Data Processing API
info.description: Backend API for Finance Dashboard with Role-Based Access Control

get.summary: Get all transactions with optional filters and pagination

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type: INCOME or EXPENSE

post.description: Creates a new user with VIEWER role by default
Authenticate and receive a JWT token

get.description: Returns monthly income and expense breakdown. Default is last 6 months. ANALYST and ADMIN only.
Returns total income, total expenses, net balance, and transaction count. Accessible by all roles.
Returns the latest N transactions. Default limit is 10. Accessible by all roles.
Returns total amounts grouped by category. Filter by INCOME or EXPENSE. ANALYST and ADMIN only.
Returns the authenticated user's profile info
